pillar_metadata.name: Resistance
pillar_metadata.description: Opposition to change; providing structure through inertia and friction.

velocity_damping.impact: Slows movement and state changes to prevent systemic chaos.

harm_mitigation.impact: Acts as the primary shield against state disruption and transformation.

instability.result: Chaos; the unit has no structure and changes state too rapidly to maintain identity.

stagnation.result: Lock-in; the unit is too rigid to move or adapt, leading to eventual collapse.
